stemHtml: An airway designator should contain the following numbers and letters?

options.a: At least 1 letter and 1 number but not exceeding 6 characters.
options.b: At least 2 letters and 2 numbers but not exceeding 6 characters.
options.c: At least 1 letter and 2 numbers but not exceeding 5 characters.
options.d: At least 1 letter and 3 numbers but not exceeding 5 characters.
